export class MythicalBlueprintOpenParser{constructor(){this._sessionId=0;this._blueprintItemId=0;this._slotCount=0;this._weaponInvItemId=0;this._augmentInvItemId=0;this._optionalInvItemId=0;this._predictedUpgradeId=0;this._craftable=false;}flush(){this._sessionId=0;this._blueprintItemId=0;this._slotCount=0;this._weaponInvItemId=0;this._augmentInvItemId=0;this._optionalInvItemId=0;this._predictedUpgradeId=0;this._craftable=false;return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;// Must match MythicalBlueprintOpenComposer.java EXACTLY
this._sessionId=wrapper.readInt();this._blueprintItemId=wrapper.readInt();this._slotCount=wrapper.readInt();this._weaponInvItemId=wrapper.readInt();this._augmentInvItemId=wrapper.readInt();this._optionalInvItemId=wrapper.readInt();this._predictedUpgradeId=wrapper.readInt();this._craftable=wrapper.readBoolean();return true;}get sessionId(){return this._sessionId;}get blueprintItemId(){return this._blueprintItemId;}get slotCount(){return this._slotCount;}get weaponInvItemId(){return this._weaponInvItemId;}get augmentInvItemId(){return this._augmentInvItemId;}get optionalInvItemId(){return this._optionalInvItemId;}get predictedUpgradeId(){return this._predictedUpgradeId;}get craftable(){return this._craftable;}}
